test_run.name: Rajesh Kumar 14-Day Clinical E2E
test_run.description: Full pipeline test: 27 BP readings over 14 days + 13 enriched events through Modules 7-13

output_messages.triggerSummary: HALT: Triple whammy AKI risk. Patient on RASi + SGLT2i + diuretic with illness/vomiting.
output_messages.recommendedAction: Pause SGLT2i and diuretic. Urgent eGFR + creatinine within 48 hours. If confirmed AKI: hold all three agents until renal function recovers.

output_messages.triggerSummary: HALT: Euglycemic DKA risk. Patient on SGLT2i with nausea/vomiting. Glucose may be NORMAL despite ketoacidosis.
output_messages.recommendedAction: Hold SGLT2i immediately. Check blood ketones urgently. If ketones elevated: emergency department. If no symptoms: hold 48h, resume after trigger resolves.

module9_engagement.note: Timer-driven: emits at 23:59 UTC daily. Zero output expected in burst E2E test.

module10_meal_response.note: Session-window: opens on MEAL event, closes at meal+3h05m. Zero output expected (timer not fired).

output_messages.recommended_action: Generate urgent review card within 4 hours
